hook.text: EDERSON MEDICAL TODAY AS WINDOW OPENS TOMORROW

beats.text: UNITED AGREED THE £35M ATALANTA DEAL WEEKS AGO
HIS MEDICAL WAS DELAYED BY A BRAZIL WORLD CUP CALL-UP
OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT DUE WHEN THE WINDOW OPENS JUNE 15
LEWIS HALL ALSO IN ACTIVE TALKS AS SECOND SIGNING NEARS

caption: It's happening — Ederson Silva is undergoing his Man United medical in New York TODAY, timed with the World Cup. The £35m Atalanta deal was agreed weeks ago but his late Brazil call-up delayed the formalities. Window opens tomorrow (June 15) and the official announcement is expected very soon. Lewis Hall is also in active talks as Carrick lines up signing number two. 🔴 How excited are you for this window? Let us know below.
